subcodes.first_line: O Herald of the Covenant! That which thou hast written was read and noted. Its perusal brought great joy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی میثاق آنچه نگاشتید قرائت گشت و ملاحظه گردید از تلاوتش بشاشت حاصل شد
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @Hands of the Cause
